units.description: Input precondition: every edge's endpoints lie in [0, n) and every weight is non-negative. (V002 paired control.)
Size: the returned dist vector has length n. (V002 paired control.)
Achievability: if dist[v] == Some(d), there exists a path from source to v with total weight d. (V002 paired control.)
Optimality: if dist[v] == Some(d), no path from source to v has total weight less than d. (V002 paired control.)
common_failure_modes: stating only a weaker existence claim
asserting only on the shortest-path tree edges

units.description: Unreachability: if dist[v] == None, there is no path from source to v. (V002 paired control.)
Termination on every valid input. (V002 paired control.)
